query: SELECT p.displayName, u.email FROM participants p JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id WHERE u.email IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p.displayName LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT p.displayName, u.email FROM participants p JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id WHERE u.email IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p.displayName LIMIT 1;
